data: Learn how to recommend items and compare products

message:
Hey! Today we're learning how to recommend items and compare products in English.

A clear recommendation with a reason helps others make better decisions.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/b89bb608-b4a0-47ff-8c2f-220b01faaf32-59.-Recommending-Items-and-Comparing-Products.jpg
button_text: Cool!

message:
When you want to recommend something, use this structure:

"I would recommend [item] because [reason]."

For example: "I would recommend the noise-cancelling headphones because they block all background distractions."
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/b89bb608-b4a0-47ff-8c2f-220b01faaf32-59.-Recommending-Items-and-Comparing-Products.jpg
button_text: Got it!

message:
Here's another example.

If a friend asks about a good laptop, you can say:

"I would recommend this laptop because it has a long battery life and is easy to carry."
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/b89bb608-b4a0-47ff-8c2f-220b01faaf32-59.-Recommending-Items-and-Comparing-Products.jpg
button_text: Next!

message:
This structure gives a clear recommendation and explains the reason behind it.

It helps the other person understand why your suggestion is a good choice.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/b89bb608-b4a0-47ff-8c2f-220b01faaf32-59.-Recommending-Items-and-Comparing-Products.jpg
button_text: Makes sense!

message:
Let's practice recommending items and comparing products!

image_url:
button_text: Start Practice!

Select the correct way to recommend a product

1.I would recommend the noise-cancelling headphones because they block all background distractions.
2.The noise-cancelling headphones are okay but there are better ones out there.

Correct answer: 1

Select the correct way to recommend a restaurant

1.I would recommend this restaurant because the food is fresh and the service is excellent.
2.This restaurant is decent but I have had better food elsewhere to be honest.

Correct answer: 1
I&&would&&recommend the&&noise-cancelling headphones because&&they block&&all background&&distractions.
I&&would&&recommend this&&laptop because&&it&&has a&&long&&battery&&life and&&is&&easy to&&carry.
I&&would&&recommend this&&restaurant because the&&food&&is&&fresh and&&the&&service is&&excellent.

first_message: That was incredible! Now we're going to practice by answering few questions in English. Can we start?
prompt_id: 4d3f5213-fcc4-40f3-879d-051908377a31
questions: "'1. Your friend asks which laptop to buy for work. How do you give a recommendation?'

'2. A colleague asks which phone is better for daily use. How do you recommend one?'

'3. Your family member asks which streaming app to subscribe to. How do you suggest one?'

'4. A friend asks which restaurant to visit in your city. How do you make a recommendation?'

'5. Your colleague asks which productivity tool to use for managing tasks. How do you recommend one?'"
